title: Audit and enforce `.prism` self-containment boundaries
summary: Audited the live .prism publication paths, codified the semantic-versus-correlation boundary, and tightened plan-stream export/tests so runtime session/worktree/branch scope cannot leak into repo-published plan logs.

acceptance.label: Defines the concrete enforcement points so repo-published writes cannot introduce unresolved shared-runtime-only references.
Enumerates all repo-published event and artifact families that can carry references into provenance or coordination state.
For each reference shape, classifies semantic versus correlation usage and forbids runtime-only semantic dependencies in `.prism`.
